r.statusid, r.subpracticeid, r.udf1, r.udf2, r.udf3, r.userid, r.workexedays, r.workexperience
FROM project AS p
LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p.statusid = s.statusid
LEFT JOIN customer AS c ON p.customerid = c.customerid
LEFT JOIN projecttype AS p0 ON p.projecttypeid = p0.projecttypeid
LEFT JOIN subpractice AS s0 ON p.subpracticeid = s0.subpracticeid
LEFT JOIN practice AS p1 ON s0.practiceid = p1.practiceid

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END AS "CustomerCompanyName"

    FROM project AS p

FROM (
    SELECT r.employeeid, r.ade, r.baseoffice, r.branchid, r.categorysubstatusid, r.companyemail, r.contactno, r.costcenter, r.createdby, r.createdon, r.dateofbirth, r.dateofjoining, r.departmentid, r.designationid, r.employeename, r.employeeregion, r.isactive, r.isdeleted, r.lastupdatedby, r.lastupdatedon, r.reportheadid, r.resignationdate, r.sbu, r.sbuid, r.statusid, r.subpracticeid, r.udf1, r.udf2, r.udf3, r.userid, r.workexedays, r.workexperience
    FROM rmsemployee AS r
    WHERE r.userid = @__tmc_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS t
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT e.employeeroleid, e.employeeid, e.roleid, r0.roleid AS roleid0, r0.createdby, r0.createddate, r0.isactive, r0.isadmin, r0.isdeleted, r0.isrowlevel, r0.lastupdateby, r0.lastupdatedate, r0.rolename

    LEFT JOIN role AS r0 ON e.roleid = r0.roleid

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

FROM (
    SELECT r.employeeid, r.ade, r.baseoffice, r.branchid, r.categorysubstatusid, r.companyemail, r.contactno, r.costcenter, r.createdby, r.createdon, r.dateofbirth, r.dateofjoining, r.departmentid, r.designationid, r.employeename, r.employeeregion, r.isactive, r.isdeleted, r.lastupdatedby, r.lastupdatedon, r.reportheadid, r.resignationdate, r.sbu, r.sbuid, r.statusid, r.subpracticeid, r.udf1, r.udf2, r.udf3, r.userid, r.workexedays, r.workexperience
    FROM rmsemployee AS r
    WHERE r.userid = @__tmc_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS t
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT e.employeeroleid, e.employeeid, e.roleid, r0.roleid AS roleid0, r0.createdby, r0.createddate, r0.isactive, r0.isadmin, r0.isdeleted, r0.isrowlevel, r0.lastupdateby, r0.lastupdatedate, r0.rolename
    FROM employeerole AS e
    LEFT JOIN role AS r0 ON e.roleid = r0.roleid
) AS t0 ON t.employeeid = t0.employeeid
ORDER BY t.employeeid, t0.employeeroleid

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

FROM project AS p
LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p.statusid = s.statusid
LEFT JOIN customer AS c ON p.customerid = c.customerid
LEFT JOIN projecttype AS p0 ON p.projecttypeid = p0.projecttypeid
LEFT JOIN subpractice AS s0 ON p.subpracticeid = s0.subpracticeid
LEFT JOIN practice AS p1 ON s0.practiceid = p1.practiceid

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

2025-03-17 11:03:38.509 +05:30 [INF] Executed DbCommand (116ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

LEFT JOIN customer AS c ON p.customerid = c.customerid
LEFT JOIN projecttype AS p0 ON p.projecttypeid = p0.projecttypeid
LEFT JOIN subpractice AS s0 ON p.subpracticeid = s0.subpracticeid

LEFT JOIN rmsemployee AS r ON p.accountmanagerid = r.employeeid

    FROM projectcontract AS p2
    LEFT JOIN rmsemployee AS r0 ON p2.deliveryanchorid = r0.employeeid
) AS t ON p.projectid = t.projectid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p3.projectemployeeassignmentid, p3.categorysubstatusid, p3.createdby, p3.createddate, p3.employeeid, p3.enddate, p3.isactive, p3.isdeleted, p3.lastupdateby, p3.lastupdatedate, p3.projectid, p3.startdate, p3.statusid, r1.employeeid AS employeeid0, r1.ade, r1.baseoffice, r1.branchid, r1.categorysubstatusid AS categorysubstatusid0, r1.companyemail, r1.contactno, r1.costcenter, r1.createdby AS createdby0, r1.createdon, r1.dateofbirth, r1.dateofjoining, r1.departmentid, r1.designationid, r1.employeename, r1.employeeregion, r1.isactive AS isactive0, r1.isdeleted AS isdeleted0, r1.lastupdatedby, r1.lastupdatedon, r1.reportheadid, r1.resignationdate, r1.sbu, r1.sbuid, r1.statusid AS statusid0, r1.subpracticeid, r1.udf1, r1.udf2, r1.udf3, r1.userid, r1.workexedays, r1.workexperience
    FROM projectemployeeassignment AS p3

) AS t0 ON p.projectid = t0.projectid

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

LEFT JOIN role AS r0 ON e.roleid = r0.roleid

    FROM rolepage AS r1

    LEFT JOIN module AS m ON p.moduleid = m.moduleid
) AS t ON r0.roleid = t.roleid

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

) AS t ON r0.roleid = t.roleid

    FROM projectcontract AS p2

) AS t ON p.projectid = t.projectid

    FROM projectemployeeassignment AS p3

) AS t0 ON p.projectid = t0.projectid

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

    FROM projectcontract AS p2

) AS t ON p.projectid = t.projectid

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

r.statusid, r.subpracticeid, r.udf1, r.udf2, r.udf3, r.userid, r.workexedays, r.workexperience
FROM project AS p
LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p.statusid = s.statusid
LEFT JOIN customer AS c ON p.customerid = c.customerid
LEFT JOIN projecttype AS p0 ON p.projecttypeid = p0.projecttypeid
LEFT JOIN subpractice AS s0 ON p.subpracticeid = s0.subpracticeid
LEFT JOIN practice AS p1 ON s0.practiceid = p1.practiceid
LEFT JOIN rmsemployee AS r ON p.accountmanagerid = r.employeeid

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

FROM employeerole AS e
INNER JOIN rmsemployee AS r ON e.employeeid = r.employeeid
LEFT JOIN role AS r0 ON e.roleid = r0.roleid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT r1.rolepageid, r1.isbillingpermit, r1.isdeletepermit, r1.isreadpermit, r1.iswritepermit, r1.pageid, r1.pagesequence, r1.roleid, p.pageid AS pageid0, p.actionname, p.controllername, p.createdby, p.createddate, p.icon, p.isactive, p.isdeleted, p.lastupdatedby, p.lastupdateddate, p.moduleid, p.pagename, m.moduleid AS moduleid0, m.createdby AS createdby0, m.createddate AS createddate0, m.icon AS icon0, m.isactive AS isactive0, m.isdeleted AS isdeleted0, m.lastupdatedby AS lastupdatedby0, m.lastupdateddate AS lastupdateddate0, m.modulename
    FROM rolepage AS r1
    LEFT JOIN page AS p ON r1.pageid = p.pageid
    LEFT JOIN module AS m ON p.moduleid = m.moduleid
) AS t ON r0.roleid = t.roleid
WHERE r.userid = @__employeeCode_0
ORDER BY e.employeeroleid, r.employeeid, r0.roleid, t.rolepageid, t.pageid0

    SELECT r1.rolepageid, r1.isbillingpermit, r1.isdeletepermit, r1.isreadpermit, r1.iswritepermit, r1.pageid, r1.pagesequence, r1.roleid, p.pageid AS pageid0, p.actionname, p.controllername, p.createdby, p.createddate, p.icon, p.isactive, p.isdeleted, p.lastupdatedby, p.lastupdateddate, p.moduleid, p.pagename, m.moduleid AS moduleid0, m.createdby AS createdby0, m.createddate AS createddate0, m.icon AS icon0, m.isactive AS isactive0, m.isdeleted AS isdeleted0, m.lastupdatedby AS lastupdatedby0, m.lastupdateddate AS lastupdateddate0, m.modulename

    LEFT JOIN page AS p ON r1.pageid = p.pageid
    LEFT JOIN module AS m ON p.moduleid = m.moduleid
) AS t ON r0.roleid = t.roleid
WHERE r.userid = @__employeeCode_0

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

    FROM rolepage AS r1

) AS t ON r0.roleid = t.roleid
WHERE r.userid = @__employeeCode_0

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

r.statusid, r.subpracticeid, r.udf1, r.udf2, r.udf3, r.userid, r.workexedays, r.workexperience
FROM project AS p

LEFT JOIN customer AS c ON p.customerid = c.customerid
LEFT JOIN projecttype AS p0 ON p.projecttypeid = p0.projecttypeid

) AS t ON p.projectid = t.projectid

    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid AS "CustomerId", CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END AS "CustomerCompanyName"
FROM customer AS c
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM project AS p
    WHERE c.customerid = p.customerid AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM projectcontract AS p0
        WHERE p.projectid = p0.projectid AND EXISTS (

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"

SELECT c.customerid, c.firstname, c.lastname, CASE
    WHEN c.companyname = '' THEN (COALESCE(c.firstname, '') || ' ') || COALESCE(c.lastname, '')
    ELSE c.companyname
END, (c.companylogourl IS NULL) OR c.companylogourl = '', c.companylogourl, c.pannumber, c.gstnumber, c.companyemail, COALESCE(c.phone1, ''), COALESCE(c.address1, ''), COALESCE(c.zipcode, ''), p.paymenttermid IS NULL, p.paymenttermid, p.paymenttermname, c0.currencyid IS NULL, c0.currencyid, c0.currencyname, c1.cityid IS NULL, c1.cityid, c1.cityname, (
    SELECT count(*)::int
    FROM project AS p0
    WHERE c.customerid = p0.customerid), t."ProjectId", t."ProjectName", t."TotalEmployees", t."TotalAmount", t."ProjectStatus", t.statusid
FROM customer AS c
LEFT JOIN paymentterm AS p ON c.paymenttermid = p.paymenttermid
LEFT JOIN currency AS c0 ON c.currencyid = c0.currencyid
LEFT JOIN city AS c1 ON c.cityid = c1.cityid
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p1.projectid AS "ProjectId", COALESCE(p1.projectname, '') AS "ProjectName", (
        SELECT count(*)::int
        FROM projectcontract AS p2
        INNER JOIN contractemployee AS c2 ON p2.contractid = c2.contractid
        WHERE p1.projectid = p2.projectid AND c2.categorysubstatusid IN (5, 6, 4, 3, 2) AND c2.contractid = COALESCE((
            SELECT p3.contractid
            FROM projectcontract AS p3
            WHERE p1.projectid = p3.projectid
            LIMIT 1), 0)) AS "TotalEmployees", (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(p4.amount), 0.0)
        FROM projectcontract AS p4
        WHERE p1.projectid = p4.projectid) AS "TotalAmount", s.statusname AS "ProjectStatus", s.statusid, p1.customerid
    FROM project AS p1
    LEFT JOIN status AS s ON p1.statusid = s.statusid
) AS t ON c.customerid = t.customerid
WHERE (c.isdeleted <> TRUE OR (c.isdeleted IS NULL)) AND (c.isactive <> FALSE OR (c.isactive IS NULL))
ORDER BY c.customerid, p.paymenttermid, c0.currencyid, c1.cityid, t."ProjectId"
